title: Human Research NOT Requiring Regulatory Review
description: Does the project involve any of the following?

no_review_default_no.title: No - All responses below will be defaulted to NO

human_s1_q1.title: 1. Commercially available human cell lines, including cadaveric and HEK293 cells
human_s1_q1.description: Exception: commercially available human embryonic cell lines other than HEK293 require review and should not be indicated here

human_s1_q2.title: 2. Commercially available human organoids
human_s1_q2.description: Exception: commercially available organoids derived from human embryonic or fetal tissues require review and should not be indicated here

human_s1_q3.title: 3. Commercially available POOLED human products (e.g., serum, plasma, RBCs, urine, CSF, etc. collected from multiple donors and pooled together into one specimen)
human_s1_q3.description: Commercially available single donor products require review and should not be indicated here

human_s1_q4.title: 4. Established, existing patient-derived xenograft (PDX) models
human_s1_q4.description: Note: Use of PDX in animals will require Animal Regulatory Agency review

human_s1_q5.title: 5. Commercial services
human_s1_q5.description: When a non-DOD organization receives DOD funds to perform analyses as a commercial service (i.e., fee for service) to another organization; e.g., a commercial lab providing routine diagnostic support to a DOD-funded clinical trial
